ValidationRule.description: Restricts editing of Customer Details section fields (from Booking_Record_Page Lightning page) once Stage_Status__c is Completed and Stage1__c is Agreement.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( OR( AND( ISPICKVAL(Stage_Status__c, "Completed"), ISPICKVAL(Stage__c, "Agreement") ), ISPICKVAL(Stage__c, "Demands & Progressive Collections"), ISPICKVAL(Stage__c, "Registration"), ISPICKVAL(Stage__c, "Customer Service & Complaints"), ISPICKVAL(Stage__c, "Maintenance"), ISPICKVAL(Stage__c, "Possession / Handover"), ISPICKVAL(Stage__c, "Cancellation") ), OR( ISCHANGED(S__c), ISCHANGED(Age__c), ISCHANGED(Occupation__c), ISCHANGED(First_Applicant_Name__c), ISCHANGED(Son_Daughter_Wife_of1__c), ISCHANGED(PAN_Number__c) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Customer Details cannot be modified once the Agreement stage is marked as Completed.
